entries.reason: FULL-CATEGORY GAP: no RewardBench-2/JudgeBench/CriticBench/LLMBar per-id score for any fleet id (agent-2). Builder sentinel-ranks by version_rank desc; opus-4-8 (48) lands above opus-4-7 (47). The only new 4-8 signal (self-critique ~4x-less-miss self-claim) is [UNVERIFIED] vendor self-claim, not emitted as a row.
FULL-CATEGORY GAP (agent-2). Prior table led with 4-7; binding A-1 routes GAP cats to deterministic version_rank-desc sentinel, which places 4-7 below 4-8. Residual conflict flagged in CR-4.

PROXY/GAP: no PlanBench/NATURAL-PLAN/TravelPlanner fleet-keyed score (agent-3). GDPval-AA proxy (opus-4-8 1890 > gpt-5.5 1769 > opus-4-7 1753) is agentic_execution-adjacent, not an architecture bench; not emitted as an architecture row. Builder sentinel-ranks by version_rank desc.

GDPval-AA 1769 nudges gpt-5.5 above opus-4-7 (1753) within noise; binding sentinel block-orders by lineage/version_rank so gpt-5.5 (rank 55) actually sorts above the opus block on the data-free sentinel. Residual interleave uncertainty flagged in CR-5.

GAP: no Spider2/BIRD/DABstep fleet-keyed score (agent-3). HLE + GraphWalks-1M proxy (opus-4-8 dominates long-ctx retrieval) is knowledge/coding-adjacent, not a data-analysis bench; not emitted. Builder sentinel-ranks by version_rank desc.
GAP (agent-3). Proxy hint opus-4-8 > gpt-5.5 > opus-4-7 rests on HLE/GraphWalks, not a direct data bench.

GAP: no per-id IFEval/StructEval/JSON-mode/BFCL number (agent-4). Prior table led with gpt-5.5 on instruction-following/format family shape; binding A-1 routes to deterministic sentinel. gpt-5.5 (rank 55) sorts above the opus block on the data-free sentinel, consistent with the prior gpt-5.5-leads shape. Proxy-only, confidence LOW-MEDIUM.
GAP (agent-4). Weakest-evidence category; ranked by sentinel + IFEval/StructEval family-shape prior, not measured this run.

performance_cost_winsorization.note: Performance-branch only: per-pairing $/token clipped to the [p05,p95] universe window before cost_norm (renormalized by the winsorized max), so an extreme price ratio cannot swing the capability-dominant score (~R^0.2). cost_efficiency uses the raw cost_norm.

metadata.cost_figure_methodology: SOP-2 worst-case $/token: fixed 100K-in / 20K-visible-out blend, opus tokenizer inflation 1.35x (1.4x deprecated), effort hidden-output multiplier ladder, gpt-5.5 272K cliff sub-cliff at this blend. cost_norm = $/token / universe-max in (0,1]. Branch score = perf_norm^a / cost_norm^b. Refinement #6: the PERFORMANCE branch winsorizes $/token to the [p05,p95] universe window before cost_norm (see performance_cost_winsorization) so an extreme price ratio cannot swing the capability-dominant score; cost_efficiency uses the raw cost_norm.
